data.title: Scinai Immunotherapeutics Highlights Expanded CDMO Platform and Immunology Pipeline at BIO-Europe Spring® 2026
data.description: Jerusalem - On March 19, 2026, Scinai Immunotherapeutics Ltd. (Nasdaq: SCNI), a biopharmaceutical company specializing in inflammation and immunology therapeutics, announced its ownership of Scinai Biopharma Services Ltd. The latter is a swiftly growing contract development entity affiliated with Scinai Immunotherapeutics Ltd.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Concentrix Stock Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: Concentrix Corporation (NASDAQ: CNXC) is set to announce its Q1 earnings on March 24, with analysts predicting earnings of $2.65 per share, a decrease from $2.79 per share in the prior year. Revenue is expected to reach $2.49 billion for the quarter, up from $2.37 billion a year ago. Following a positive Q4 performance in 2025, investors are hopeful for dividends, with Concentrix currently offering an annual dividend yield of 4.68%, equaling a quarterly dividend of 36 cents per share ($1.44 annually). Investors aiming to secure a consistent $500 monthly from the dividend yield are exploring opportunities. For more details, refer to the article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Rideshare driver in LA accused of using $2M in COVID relief to purchase crypto; around 40 BTC seized in investigation.
data.description: Investigators have confiscated approximately 40 bitcoins in connection with a case involving allegations of wire fraud and money laundering against a rideshare driver.

data.title: Bragg Gaming Group Reports Record Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Revenues; Welcomes Accomplished iGaming Executive, Thomas Winter, to Board
data.description: In Toronto, Bragg Gaming Group (NASDAQ:BRAG; TSX:BRAG), a prominent iGaming content and platform technology solutions provider, released its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter of 2025. Key highlights from the fourth quarter of 2025 include achieving a record total quarterly revenue of €27.7 million. This represents a 5.1% revenue growth (excluding The Netherlands) compared to the same period in 2024. However, there was a decrease of 4.6% in revenue from The Netherlands.

data.title: BTQ Technologies Announces First Deployment of BIP 360 on Bitcoin Quantum Testnet v0.3.0
data.description: Developers, miners, and researchers are offered the opportunity to assess the functionality of quantum-resistant Bitcoin transactions in the Bitcoin Quantum testnet. The latest version, v0.3.0, marks the successful implementation of BIP 360, giving users a live platform to test these transactions. This development signifies a significant milestone in the Bitcoin Quantum project, allowing stakeholders to actively engage with quantum-resistant technology.

data.title: SHINESTY LAUNCHES WORLD'S FIRST FART-BLOCKING UNDERWEAR FABRIC, GIVING THE WORLD PERMISSION TO "RELEASE IN PEACE"
data.description: In Denver on March 19, 2026, clothing company Shinesty has introduced a groundbreaking product that aims to revolutionize undergarments. The innovative Shinesty Fart-Blocking Underwear is designed to combat odors associated with flatulence, with claims of neutralizing as much as 99% of fart smells. This launch marks a unique advancement in the apparel industry, targeting a common and relatable issue with a touch of humor. This development could potentially impact the lives of many, offering a solution to a universal problem.

data.title: Arcos Dorados Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Montevideo, Uruguay-- Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO), the largest restaurant chain in Latin America and the Caribbean as well as the world's biggest independent McDonald's franchisee, announced its unaudited quarterly results and audited yearly results for the periods ending on December 31, 2025. In a statement from CEO Luis Raganato, the company highlighted its key strengths including a powerful brand, a durable business model, and a unique corporate culture.

data.title: Stray Kids x Bioré UV: Anthem Film Featuring New Song “Endless Sun” Launches Globally on March 19 (JST)
data.description: In Tokyo, Kao Corporation's Bioré UV is set to kick off its worldwide initiative "SUNLIGHT IS YOUR SPOTLIGHT" with Stray Kids at 20:30 (JST) on March 19, 2026.

data.title: Bybit Introduces Yield-Bearing Gold Product Offering APR on Tokenized Gold
data.description: On March 19, 2026, in Dubai, UAE, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally based on trading volume, introduced XAUT Earn. This new product allows users to earn interest on tokenized gold holdings, a unique feature not widely available in traditional or digital markets.
